body:
## Rationale

Mike Portnoy has a kit article (`whats-in-mike-portnoys-kit`) + Images and Words (1992) article. A Dramatic Turn of Events (Mike Mangini, 2011) is in ai-fix queue (#1792). But **Metropolis Pt. 2: Scenes from a Memory (1999) has no article** — and it's universally regarded as Portnoy's magnum opus and Dream Theater's definitive album.

**Search intent:** 'mike portnoy scenes from a memory drum setup', 'dream theater 1999 drummer gear', 'metropolis part 2 recording drums' — high-intent prog-metal queries not covered by existing content.

**Gear distinctiveness:** SFaM = Tama Starclassic Maple kit (different from later DW period), Sabian Artisan cymbal series, DW 5000 double pedals. The recording at BearTracks (NY) with Neil Kernon engineering is well-documented. Completely different era from Images and Words.

## Target queries
- 'mike portnoy scenes from a memory drum setup'
- 'dream theater 1999 drum kit'
- 'metropolis pt 2 drummer gear'
- 'mike portnoy tama drum setup'

## Files to create
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add entry with slug `scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup`
  - drummer: 'Mike Portnoy'
  - band: 'Dream Theater'
  - album: 'Metropolis Pt. 2: Scenes from a Memory'
  - year: 1999
  - relatedDrummerSlug: 'mike-portnoy'
  - gear: Tama Starclassic Maple (cherry finish), Sabian Artisan cymbals, DW 5000 pedals, Remo Ambassador heads, Vic Firth Horacio Hernandez SD2 sticks
  - Content: Concept album writing process, how the drumming serves the narrative arc, BearTracks recording sessions, Portnoy's use of tabla percussion on 'Beyond This Life', gear shift after SFaM, connection to Metropolis Pt. 1 (Images and Words)
  - Min 400 words, ≥3 FAQ Q&A, ≥3 internal links
- `public/llms/articles/scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup.md` — AI citation markdown

## Quality gate
- ≥400 words
- FAQPage + Article schema (parent template)
- MusicAlbum entity: 'Metropolis Pt. 2' by Dream Theater (1999)
- Internal links: → mike-portnoy profile, → images-and-words article, → a-dramatic-turn-of-events article (when #1792 ships)
- `<time datetime>` stamp

## Verify
1. `grep 'scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` returns new entry
2. /articles/scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup renders with full content
3. Sitemap includes URL
4. LLM file exists at /llms/articles/scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup.md
5. Content covers distinct gear era from Images and Words article

## Done
When /articles/scenes-from-a-memory-drum-setup renders with ≥400 words and LLM file exists.
title: SEO: Dream Theater — Metropolis Pt. 2: Scenes from a Memory drum setup article (Mike Portnoy peak era)
